questions.question: In the mathematical expression $4^5$, the number $4$ is called the:
questions.explanation: In $a^n$, the number $a$ (which is multiplied repeatedly) is called the base.

questions.question: What is the evaluated value of $3^4$?
Any non-zero number raised to the power of $0$ is equal to:
questions.explanation: By mathematical definition, any non-zero number to the power of 0 is equal to 1 ($a^0 = 1$).

questions.question: Which of the following expressions is equivalent to the multiplication: $2 \times 2 \times 2 \times 2 \times 2$?
questions.explanation: Since 2 is multiplied by itself 5 times, it is written as $2^5$.
